Reviews Contact

About Legacy Dentist

12+ years serving Scottsdale and surrounding areas

Since 2012, Legacy Dentist has been serving Scottsdale and surrounding communities with a commitment to excellence in dental care. Our journey began with a simple mission: to provide personalized, compassionate dentistry that makes every patient feel at home.

We believe in taking the time to understand your unique needs and concerns. Our team stays current with the latest dental advancements to ensure you receive the highest standard of care in a relaxed, modern environment.

As part of the Scottsdale community, we're proud to support local schools and organizations. From Old Town to North Scottsdale, we're dedicated to helping our neighbors maintain healthy, beautiful smiles.

12+ Years in Business
500+ Projects Completed
98% Client Satisfaction
15+ Team Members
Legacy Dentist

Trusted dental professionals serving Scottsdale, AZ and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-den-r94
